Additionally, my own experiences have shown me that what I find beautiful is influenced by my personal preferences and the context in which I encounter something. Therefore, I would place beautifulness at around 65 on this spectrum, acknowledging the subjective nature of beauty while recognizing that there are some objective elements to it as well.
